entry.title: SpaceWord – DevOps & Automated Testing
entry.content:
​SpaceWord is not just a game; it is a full-stack demonstration of modern software engineering. It features a robust development lifecycle where code quality is guaranteed by automation.


Docker

Mocha

Cypress

CI/CD

Testing Strategy

My primary focus was Zero-Bug Deployment. I implemented:

  • Unit Testing: Logic validation with Mocha & Chai.
  • Security Tests: Input sanitization and boundary checks.
  • E2E Testing: Real-user simulation using Cypress.

DevOps Pipeline

The project follows a professional workflow:

  • Auto-Build: Dockerized environment (Nginx Alpine).
  • Auto-Test: Tests run automatically on every Push.
  • Auto-Deploy: Verified images sent to Docker Hub.
Professional Note: All tests are executed inside Docker containers to ensure environment parity between development and production.
View Source Code Play Live Demo
entry.summary: A high-performance game built with a professional CI/CD pipeline, focusing on security and automated testing.

entry.title: NEXUS – Modern Social Networking Platform
entry.content:
​NEXUS is a full-stack social networking platform built to bridge the gap between complex backend logic and a fluid, high-performance user interface. This project highlights my expertise in React.js, Secure Authentication, and building interactive community features.

Key Features

  • Secure Authentication System: A robust Login and Sign-up flow ensuring user data protection. Features include secure session management and protected routes to prevent unauthorized access.
  • Interactive Feed System: A real-time post listing with advanced filtering, relative time formatting, and seamless content loading.
  • Full Engagement Suite: Comprehensive Like and Comment systems with instant UI feedback (Optimistic UI updates) and interactive toggle views.
  • Dynamic Content Management (CRUD): Smooth “In-place Editing” system where users can modify their posts without leaving the page, alongside soft-delete capabilities.
  • Personalized Experience: Each user has a unique profile, and the system strictly enforces ownership—only the creator of a post or comment has the authority to edit or remove it.
  • Luxury UI/UX: A mobile-first design utilizing Tailwind CSS for a clean, modern aesthetic with smooth transitions and glassmorphism elements.

Tech Stack

📁 Source Code
entry.summary: A dynamic, real-time social media application designed for seamless user interaction, featuring live post updates, secure authentication, and engagement systems.

entry.title: CineLuxe – Admin Dashboard
entry.content:
​CineLuxe is a high-end administrative interface built to streamline cinema operations. This project showcases my ability to develop complex CRUD systems and manage relational databases while maintaining a premium, “Glassmorphism” inspired user experience.

Key Features

  • Movie Management (CRUD): Complete control over the movie catalog, allowing admins to add, edit, and archive titles with full metadata support.
  • Advanced Hall Management: Manage cinema halls (Standard, IMAX, 4DX) with a Soft Delete feature to deactivate rooms without losing historical data.
  • Dynamic Screening Schedules: A smart scheduling system to link movies, halls, and time slots, ensuring efficient theater utilization.
  • Secure Backend Architecture: Developed with PHP PDO to ensure secure database interactions and robust protection against SQL injection.
  • Luxury UI/UX: A sleek, cinematic dark theme utilizing modern CSS techniques like Grid, Flexbox, and glass-style overlays.

Tech Stack

📁 Source Code
entry.summary: A luxury Cinema Management System with a modern dark theme, designed for seamless operations of movies, halls, and screening schedules.

entry.title: Free CV Generator – PHP Edition
entry.content:
​In the CV Generator project, I developed a functional tool for resume building that focuses on robust data validation and optimized HTML-to-PDF rendering. This project demonstrates my ability to manage complex forms and facilitate seamless interaction between backend logic and frontend presentation.

Key Features

  • Real-time Preview: Users can see their resume update instantly as they type, providing a smooth and interactive UX.
  • Dynamic Field Management: Implemented custom Vanilla JS functions to allow users to add or remove unlimited sections for education, work experience, and skills.
  • Smart Validation: Integrated advanced RegEx patterns to validate emails, international phone codes, and URLs in real-time before submission.
  • Professional PDF Export: Powered by the Dompdf library to ensure high-fidelity conversion from web styles to print-ready PDF documents.
  • Responsive Architecture: Built with a “mobile-first” approach using Bootstrap 5 and custom Media Queries for accessibility across all devices.

Tech Stack

—

📁 Source Code
entry.summary: A professional PHP-based web application to create, customize, and export high-quality resumes as PDFs.

entry.title: Klivio – Tailwind CSS Edition
entry.content:
​In this version of Klivio, I migrated the entire design to Tailwind CSS to demonstrate my ability to build consistent, scalable, and high-performance interfaces. This project focuses on rapid styling without leaving the HTML.

Key Features

  • Tailwind Architecture: Utilized utility-first classes for consistent spacing, typography, and brand identity.
  • Modular Components: Built reusable UI components including a Hero section with gradient overlays and a grid-based Course Catalog.
  • Performance Focused: Clean codebase optimized for fast rendering and professional aesthetics.
  • Modern Branding: Integrated Montserrat typography and Font Awesome icons for a premium look.

Tech Stack

🔗 View Live Demo 📁 Source Code
entry.summary: A high-performance educational interface built by me using Tailwind CSS and Utility-First principles.

entry.title: Klivio – Professional Learning Platform
entry.content:
​Klivio is a modern, responsive landing page designed for an educational platform. The focus of this project was to master UI/UX transition from design to a clean, maintainable codebase with professional aesthetics.

Key Features

  • Modern Hero Architecture: Features sophisticated multi-layered gradients and high-quality visual assets.
  • Structured Course Catalog: Managed “Popular” and “Recent” courses using advanced CSS Grid layouts.
  • Optimized UX: Implemented social proof sections, customer reviews, and professional lead-generation forms.
  • Semantic SEO: Built using 100% semantic HTML5 tags for superior accessibility and search engine ranking.

Tech Stack

🔗 View Live Demo 📁 Source Code
entry.summary: A high-fidelity landing page designed using semantic HTML5 and advanced CSS3.

entry.title: 🌐 Epitalk – Team Project
entry.content:
​Epitalk is a collaborative front-end web application designed for students, developed during my time at Web@cadémie. It simulates a smart assistant platform with a focus on user interaction.

Key Features

  • Chatbot UI: An interactive interface for quick student Q&A.
  • Student ID Generator: (My Role) Developed a dynamic tool that generates personalized student ID cards based on user input.
  • Auth System: A clean login interface to simulate user access control.

Tech Stack

📁 Source Code
entry.summary: An interactive educational platform built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
